description: Test cases for evaluating the autoresearch skill via skill-creator

test_cases.prompt: Improve test coverage for this Python project to at least 80%

setup.description: A Python project with pytest, low test coverage (~40%), source in src/, tests in tests/

assertions.description: eval.json uses pytest as the test command

test_cases.prompt: Optimize the API response time for this Express app to be under 100ms average

setup.description: A Node.js Express project with TypeScript, slow API endpoints, existing tests

test_cases.prompt: Add edge case tests for this Go utility library to achieve 90% coverage

setup.description: A Go utility library with basic tests but missing edge cases

assertions.description: Shell eval_runner script exists for Go project

test_cases.prompt: Fix all linting errors and reduce cyclomatic complexity below 10 for this Python project

setup.description: A Python project with ruff linting, high complexity functions, and multiple code quality warnings

test_cases.prompt: Implement the missing features in this Rust library until all acceptance tests pass

setup.description: A Rust library with acceptance tests for a stack data structure, implementation is incomplete

assertions.description: eval.json uses cargo test or references acceptance tests
Shell eval_runner script exists for Rust project
